prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `64a7c07e`.
codex_response:
Implemented the new ARC2 task package for `64a7c07e` in [__init__.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_64a7c07e/__init__.py#L1), [verifier.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_64a7c07e/verifier.py#L4), and [generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_64a7c07e/generator.py#L77). The rule is: find each diagonally connected non-background object and move it right by its own bounding-box width.

I used the summary hint after checking it against all 4 official examples; it was consistent, so no `notes.md` was needed. The generator stays close to the family by making sparse square black grids with 1-3 cyan objects, using connected box-spanning masks so you get solid, holed, and diagonal motifs, and enforcing enough empty space for the width-based shift. No new primitive was added to `arc2/dsl_ext.py`.

Validation passed end to end: official examples `4/4`, generated examples `1000/1000`, and I visually checked the preview sheet against the originals. Artifacts are at [task.json](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/64a7c07e/task.json), [originals.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/64a7c07e/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/64a7c07e/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/64a7c07e/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/64a7c07e/previews/preview_03.png).
